work_unit: Deep audit of unaudited modules (benchmark/hotspot-entry/persona/planning/prompts/reference/tests + feedback_collector/knowledge_base/persona_drift/steps slug bypass)
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete with all workspace projects audited ≥1×. wechat-main audit-022 covered scripts/+script-verifier/+topic-pool/ but left 7 directories + several source files unaudited. Incremental deep audit triggered.
action: Ran sonnet sub-agent to deep-audit remaining modules. Read 23 files across benchmark/, hotspot-entry/, persona/, planning/, prompts/, reference/, tests/, and source scripts (feedback_collector.py, knowledge_base.py, persona_drift.py, steps.py, pipeline.py). Found 6 actionable findings (1H+3M+2L) after deduplication against audit-022 H-001. Wrote audit report audit-2026-07-08-041.md. Updated audit-cycle-state to fix-in-progress with 6 pending derived_fixes.
outcome_evidence: audit-2026-07-08-041.md written (6 findings: WC-EXT-H-002, WC-EXT-M-001..M-003, WC-EXT-L-001..L-002). audit-cycle-state.json updated: status=fix-in-progress, pending_count=6, last_audit_id=audit-2026-07-08-041. WC-EXT-H-001 deduped against audit-022 H-001 (same file+line). No opt-worktree commit this round (audit-only per protocol).
next_suggestion: 派生 WC-EXT-H-002 fix: feedback_collector.py slug validation at CLI ingestion point
派生 WC-EXT-M-002 fix: pipeline.py:125 apply _slugify to args.slug (root cause fix eliminates M-001 downstream)
派生 WC-EXT-M-003 fix: knowledge_base.py size guard before read_text
派生 WC-EXT-L-001/L-002 fixes: atomic cache write + persona_drift size guard

audit_findings.finding: slug JSONL log injection — unsanitized CLI slug embedded in JSONL record enables format corruption
audit_findings.remediation: Validate slug against re.fullmatch(r'[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]{0,63}', slug) at CLI ingestion point

audit_findings.finding: shell injection via slug interpolated into bash command strings when --slug bypasses _slugify
audit_findings.remediation: Apply _slugify to args.slug or use shlex.quote for all interpolated values

audit_findings.finding: --slug CLI override bypasses _slugify sanitization — root cause of shell injection class
unbounded file read — no size guard before read_text on CLI-supplied article path
non-atomic cache write — crash mid-write leaves corrupted JSON
audit_findings.remediation: Write to .tmp then os.rename() for atomic replacement

audit_findings.finding: unbounded markdown read in extract_style_vector — no size guard
audit_findings.remediation: Add size check, skip files exceeding threshold
